title: AI mega-listings are 'just the start,' Razer CEO says, ahead of historic SpaceX IPO
summary_full: Blockbuster public offerings from AI companies could be an enduring feature of the industry, Razer CEO Min-Liang Tan said Thursday, ahead of several mega IPOs.
summary_public: Blockbuster public offerings from AI companies could be an enduring feature of the industry, Razer CEO Min-Liang Tan said Thursday, ahead of several mega IPOs.
